meaning: n.托尔(北欧神话中的雷神)
examples: Thor Hanson's new book takes on the intriguing subject of feathers.
Mount Asgard and Thor Peak are dream destinations for rock climbers.
Marvel Comics drew from Nordic mythology to introduce its new version of Thor in 1962.
Thor Heyerdahl may have been an intrepid sailor, but ancient South Americans apparently weren't.
Thor's back-office organization has helped Keystone boost its once-struggling quality and service operation and spare-parts distribution.
